_note: Uses JSON Patch operations. Some fields cannot be modified after creation.

AMT.notes: Amount can only increase up to 20% every 180 days

TAXAMT.notes: NVP uses amount, REST uses percentage

NOTE.reason: Use reason field in suspend/cancel instead

BILLINGFREQUENCY.reason: Cannot modify billing frequency after creation
BILLINGFREQUENCY.alternative: Create new plan and migrate subscriber

BILLINGPERIOD.reason: Cannot modify billing period after creation
BILLINGPERIOD.alternative: Create new plan and migrate subscriber

Amount.notes: Amount can only increase up to 20% every 180 days

Note.reason: Use reason field in suspend/cancel instead

BillingFrequency.reason: Cannot modify billing frequency after creation
BillingFrequency.alternative: Create new plan and migrate subscriber

BillingPeriod.reason: Cannot modify billing period after creation
BillingPeriod.alternative: Create new plan and migrate subscriber

special_notes.usage: Use to update subscription details after creation
upgrade_tips: REST uses JSON Patch format with op, path, value
Billing frequency/period cannot be changed - need new plan
Amount increases limited to 20% per 180-day period
